CustomField.formula: IF( Return_Confirmed_By_Borrower__c = TRUE, "Owner to Confirm Return", IF(!ISBLANK(Requested_Due_Date_Extension__c), "Extension Requested", IF(TODAY() > Loan_Due_Date__c, "Overdue", "On Loan - " + TEXT(Loan_Due_Date__c-TODAY()) + " Day(s) Remaining")))
CustomField.label: Status
